missing_metadata_to_prove_source_parity: source_overlap_proven remains false unless source match or overlap proof is supplied

where_candidate_promoted_from_research_t.detail: selected_hypothesis/candidate_rank reporting is the promotion/reporting seam; runtime smoke itself remains manual/controlled and unchanged.

where_research_source_selected.detail: Research universe labels public KuCoin futures klines as RESEARCH_SOURCE; candidate rows use CANDIDATE_SOURCE.

where_runtime_source_selected.detail: Runtime feature profile source is rolling_quote_window and is emitted through runtime_v2 telemetry.

patch_decision.reason: Public-kline research candidates cannot be reported as runtime-admissible against rolling_quote_window runtime unless source match or overlap proof exists.

required_tests: public-kline candidate fails closed without overlap proof
runtime source label derivable from smoke profile
source parity proof allows proceeding without threshold mutation
